dataset: Metropolitan Museum of Art Open Access Collection

pi_items.source: Met Museum API search and web verification
Met Museum API object records (436528: Irises, 436532: Self-Portrait) both specify 'Oil on canvas' as medium
HTTP HEAD requests to Met Museum primaryImage URLs show: DP346474.jpg (5,101 KB), DT1502_cropped2.jpg (3,125 KB). Both far exceed 500 KB requirement.
Task description specifies '~/Documents/exhibition_catalog.json' which expands to /home/ga/Documents/exhibition_catalog.json for ga user
Task description specifies '~/Documents/met_images/' which expands to /home/ga/Documents/met_images for ga user

privileged_info_summary: The Metropolitan Museum of Art maintains an open-access collection of 16 Vincent van Gogh paintings available via their public API (https://collectionapi.metmuseum.org/). All Van Gogh paintings in the collection are oil on canvas. The images are available in high-resolution format ("original" size) with typical file sizes between 3-5 MB, far exceeding the 500 KB minimum requirement. Search results can be filtered by object type (paintings), public domain status, and image availability. Each artwork record includes the required metadata fields: title, date (objectDate), medium, accession number, and URL. The website domain is www.metmuseum.org.
